name: Momo (Magic Cat Academy) [NSFW]
description:
Momo, from Magic Cat Academy. She appears to be in heat with some magic at her disposal...

HAPPY SPOOKY MONTH, EVERYONE!!! 🎃💀

Artist: Sarox

Fine, enough time has passed so I'll let you in on a secret!

She can only use magic with her wand and she has a flying broom in her closet lol

Check that out in her second greeting! Go inside her closet in the second greeting and you-

...you'll just see what I mean.

Update: Added some Doodle Champion Island references ✨🏆
creator: CasSTAR
